metadata.title: Why the same eval() is a real bug in one file and noise in another
metadata.purpose: An LLM reads code in context — data flow, entry points, architectural intent — and assesses whether an attacker can actually reach and trigger the sink, not merely whether the dangerous token appears.
metadata.clock: narration (Kokoro am_onyx) — master clock; conform each beat to measured audio
metadata.exclusions: specific vuln types, GitHub Action wiring, custom rule syntax
metadata.visual_object: Two parallel flows (left: regex sweeping tokens; right: model reading the diff + architecture) converging on a severity line; unsafe cases cross above, safe stay below.
metadata.hook: A regex scanner finds 100 false positives; a reviewer that understands intent finds the 5 that are reachable.

beats.narration_text: The identical hardcoded key is excluded in `test_config.py` and reported in `main.py` where it handles user input; a pattern matcher flags both equally.
beats.scaffold_note: from Key case — cold open on the concrete instance

beats.narration_text: A security tool flags code identical to a known vulnerability. Pattern matchers trigger on every instance; this one doesn't. Why?
A regex scanner finds 100 false positives; a reviewer that understands intent finds the 5 that are reachable.

An LLM reads code in context — data flow, entry points, architectural intent — and assesses whether an attacker can actually reach and trigger the sink, not merely whether the dangerous token appears.
beats.visual: Two parallel flows (left: regex sweeping tokens; right: model reading the diff + architecture) converging on a severity line; unsafe cases cross above, safe stay below.
beats.scaffold_note: the resolving mechanism; orbits the visual object

beats.narration_text: `eval(user_input)` in an unauthenticated web handler → reported; `eval(expr)` inside a sandboxed math test → excluded.

An LLM reads code in context — data flow, entry points, architectural intent — and assesses whether an attacker can actually reach and trigger the sink, not merely whether the dangerous token appears.
